description: Fleet-wide structural inventory. Tracks each child repo's alignment to Garage Control Plane V2. Populated from repo_registry.json entries. Updated by Auditor after each fleet alignment check.

independent.definition: Missing all required surfaces. No Garage integration.

partial.definition: Has heir.doctrine.yaml and directories but missing CI gate or other required surfaces.

aligned.definition: All required surfaces present and valid. Garage certification gate operational.

transition_rules: Transitions are deterministic. Auditor evaluates surfaces after each run.
No manual status override. Status is derived from surface presence.
independent -> partial: heir.doctrine.yaml exists + at least one directory surface exists.
partial -> aligned: all required surfaces present including CI gate.
aligned -> partial: CI gate removed or invalidated (continue-on-error detected).
aligned -> independent: heir.doctrine.yaml removed. Full regression.
Auditor writes updated status. No other agent modifies fleet_inventory.
